name: Punchs Creek Renewable Energy Project
notable: CIS T4 award Oct 2025 (400 MW solar + 400 MW / 1,600 MWh BESS integrated hybrid). EDPR + QIC exclusivity/JV. FC expected 2026, commissioning early 2029. Part of EDPs 1.7 GW Aus fast-track pipeline (also incl. Merino NSW). Reconciliation: existing AURES records punchs-creek-hybrid-stage-2/3-kci (200+600 MW BESS EDPR) are stale multi-stage attributions that predate the consolidated T4 award scope. SkyLabs legacy Punch and Creek 87 MW is a separate project. Created 2026-07-18 to close v3.22.1 data gap.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Integrated solar + BESS hybrid; single T4 award. EDPR + QIC JV. FC expected 2026, ops early 2029. Pre-FID at ~9 months post-award. Reconciliation record created 2026-07-18 to replace stale multi-stage BESS entries.

sources.title: EDP Punchs Creek Renewable Energy Project page
pv-magazine — EDP 1.7 GW Aus fast-track pipeline (Oct 2025)

operational_notes: Single integrated hybrid: 400 MWac solar + 400 MW / 1,600 MWh BESS (4hr). CIS T4 award Oct 2025. EDP-QIC exclusivity/JV structure. FC expected 2026, commissioning early 2029. Part of EDP's 1.7 GW Australian fast-track pipeline (also incl. Merino NSW). Created 2026-07-18 to close v3.22.1 data gap — represents the T4 CISA award as a single project rather than the stale multi-stage BESS records (punchs-creek-hybrid-stage-2-kci 200 MW, punchs-creek-hybrid-stage-3-kci 600 MW). SkyLab's legacy 'Punch and Creek' 87 MW projects are separate/legacy.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 4 award (400 MW solar + 400 MW / 1,600 MWh BESS)
timeline_events.detail: Integrated hybrid project awarded CIS T4 CISA. EDPR + QIC JV as CIS counterparty.
